features.name: queue size in inline randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include a queue variable using .size property in an inline randomize() constraint where size equals another variable

features.name: dynamic array size in inline randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array using .size property in an inline randomize() constraint where size equals another variable

features.name: multiple queue size constraints in single randomize
features.description: Code should include multiple queue variables using .size property in a single inline randomize() constraint block
